latest_features: WorldDownload now reports the exact saved .mcpack/.mcworld output path and creates export folders more reliably
World renderer is denser, supports drag-to-rotate view control, and exposes preview/point controls in ClickGUI settings
ClickGUI top tabs are larger with configurable dual header lines, and column spacing now scales to reduce overlap
New HybridPVP category/tab added and AutoPVP moved into it with experimental autotune and hotbar utility
